text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Great, it's snowing... Damn, it's freezing.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Of course it's cold! The holidays are just around
the corner!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: So, like, what're you getting for your trainer?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What do you mean "what're you getting"?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Don't tell me you're not getting anything!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I mean... I'm just not that into winter holidays.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: That's perfectly valid, but look at it like this.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Without opportunities like this, you wouldn't
know when to express your gratitude, would you?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Oof.

It's finally the holiday season, but since Narita
Taishin isn't into it, I figured there'd be no chance
she'd be interested in celebrating. That's why...
choice_data_list: (I can't believe she invited me out!)
(I can't believe she invited me out!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, you're here.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Happy holidays or whatever. Here.

I'm about to explode with joy when she hands me
a present, but I contain myself and slowly open
my gift.
Inside are BNW plush Cuties.
choice_data_list:
(Taishin's plushie is the only large-sized
version...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I won them at an arcade, but I'm not into putting
things like that in my room.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: So I figured I'd give them to you. That's all.
choice_data_list: (Taishin's plushie is the only one that's big!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?! Why are you grinning like that?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I swear I'll roundhouse kick you into another dimension!

I carefully tuck the plushies back into the box as
she scolds me, which is when I notice something.

There's a bottle that smells really good in there as
well.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Isn't it obvious? It's leave-in conditioner!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I didn't have much time to choose a present, so I
didn't know what to get.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I talked with someone at the store, and
apparently this is a really popular gift.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I've seen my classmates giving it to each other as
birthday gifts, and it's not like it matters if you
already have some.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you can't ever have too much conditioner
for your tail, so—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Wait.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Give that back right this INSTANT, and forget
this ever happened!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What? But you don't even have a tail to condition!
choice_data_list: I'll keep it as a decoration.
I'll keep it as a decoration.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You're so dumb.

We walk around town after that, when suddenly
Taishin stops dead at the sight of a digital
billboard.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
If there's one player who's gotten a lot of
attention this year, it's this unmatched
three-point shooter!

A face flashes up on the screen. It's a redheaded
basketball player smiling shyly.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: That's one way to put it...

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
Yes, the Umamusume I'm rooting for just got first
place in the autumn Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
She reminded me that I need to keep pushing
hard too!

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text: She's so amazing! You're my hero, Narita Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, well... Anyway...

Narita Taishin looks away, embarrassed, but after
several moments of awkward silence, she speaks
up.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You know...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm not trying to be a role model for anyone. I'm
not trying to inspire people.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I run just for myself. But...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Being looked up to isn't the worst feeling in the
world, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
People make fun of me, they get clingy, they hold
on tight even when I don't want it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: And at the end of the day...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well, it's not so bad.

Narita Taishin gazes at the girl warmly, as if
reciprocating her smile.
